mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOOK ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET TITLE = #{title}, AUTHOR = #{author}, PUBLISHER = #{publisher}, PUBLISH_DATE = #{publishDate}, CATEGORY = #{category}, RANKING = #{ranking}, REVIEW_COUNT = #{reviewCount}, RATING = #{rating}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PAGES = #{pages}, PRICE = #{price}, REG_DATE = #{regDate}, BOOK_COVER = #{bookCover} WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
